When considering its maximum payload capacity of 22,800 kg to Low Earth Orbit (LEO) in an expendable configuration, this translates to roughly $2,939 per kilogram. However, for a reusable configuration, where the first stage lands back on Earth, the payload capacity to LEO is reduced to about 15,600 kg, making the cost around $4,295 per kilogram.
